description: Mechanical verification registry for documented issues. Source of truth for bug existence proof.

issues.title: export_memories omits resolved field from episodes
issues.description: export_memories SELECT for episodes does not include the resolved column. Exported JSONL episodes lose their completion status. import_memories also does not restore resolved, so round-trip export/import resets all episodes to resolved=0.

issues.title: remote index uses SELECT instead of cursor.lastrowid
issues.description: do_store() retrieves the last inserted memory ID via SELECT ... ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1 instead of cursor.lastrowid. Under concurrent inserts for the same agent_id, this could return the wrong ID for remote vector index registration.

check.pattern: SELECT id FROM memories WHERE agent_id.*ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

issues.title: calibrate_threshold modifies global VECTOR_MIN_SIMILARITY without agent isolation
issues.description: do_calibrate_threshold() writes to the global VECTOR_MIN_SIMILARITY variable. In a multi-agent environment, calibrating for agent A changes the threshold for all subsequent recall calls including agent B. The threshold should be per-agent or protected by a lock.

issues.title: episode recall results lack msg_id, invisible in messages output
issues.description: _search_episodes_fts() and _search_vector() episode results do not include a msg_id field. In do_recall(), the condition 'if r.get("msg_id")' is False for episodes, so msg["id"] is never set. Episode results in the messages array have no identifier, making them unaddressable by callers.
